creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
On 2010-06-27 00:46, Mark Linimon wrote:
 > On Sat, Jun 26, 2010 at 06:31:45PM -0400, Philip M. Gollucci wrote:
 >> On another note, this port has a large set of things that depend on it.
 >>
 >> portmgr@ should chime in on whether this would be feature safe.
 > 
 > IMHO we're too late in the cycle for a large change to this port.
 > 
 > I'm also not too sure that renaming the patchfiles is necessary -- is
 > it possible to just fix the tool to deal with this case?
 > 
 > mcl
 > 
 
 Hm, no problem.
 I got the Idea to rename the patchfiles from the FreeBSD wiki.
 
 If you like I create a second patch for the port, and change only
 the PORTVERSION in Makefile.common and the distinfo.
 There is nothing else to change for the update to 1.6.12.
 
 olli
